phrases.text_local: Non merci, je ne souhaite pas de portrait.
phrases.pronunciation: nohn mair-SEE, zhuh nuh swet PAH duh por-TREH
phrases.cultural_note: Place du Tertre artists can be pushy. A polite but firm refusal works. If you do sit for a portrait, agree on the price beforehand — it can easily be 30-80 euros.

responses.english: Alright, no problem. Have a nice day!
responses.phonetic: dah-KOR, pah duh proh-BLEM. bun zhoor-NAY
responses.local: D'accord, pas de problème. Bonne journée !

phrases.text_local: Où est le vignoble de Montmartre ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh veen-YOH-bluh duh mohn-MARTR
phrases.cultural_note: The Clos Montmartre vineyard on Rue des Saules is Paris's last working vineyard. The grape harvest festival (Fête des Vendanges) in October is a lively neighborhood celebration.

responses.english: It is on Rue des Saules, going down the hill.
responses.phonetic: seh soor lah roo day SOHL, ahn duh-sahn-DAHN lah koh-LEEN
responses.local: C'est sur la Rue des Saules, en descendant la colline.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a café recommendation away from tourist traps
phrases.text_local: Vous connaissez un bon café pas trop touristique ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo koh-neh-SAY uhn bohn kah-FAY pah troh too-rees-TEEK
phrases.cultural_note: Avoid the overpriced cafés on Place du Tertre. Walk a few blocks to Rue Lepic or Rue des Abbesses for authentic, reasonably priced spots where locals actually go.

responses.english: Go to Rue des Abbesses, it is more local.
responses.phonetic: ah-LAY soor lah roo dayz ah-BESS, seh ploo loh-KAL
responses.local: Allez sur la Rue des Abbesses, c'est plus local.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Wall of Love
phrases.text_local: Où est le Mur des Je t'aime ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh MOOR day zhuh TEM
phrases.cultural_note: Le Mur des Je t'aime (Wall of Love) is in the small Jehan Rictus garden in Place des Abbesses. It displays 'I love you' in over 300 languages.

responses.english: It is in the Jehan Rictus garden, Place des Abbesses.
responses.phonetic: seh dahn luh skwar zhuh-AHN reek-TOOS, plass dayz ah-BESS
responses.local: C'est dans le square Jehan Rictus, Place des Abbesses.

phrases.text_local: Attention aux arnaques avec les bracelets !
phrases.pronunciation: ah-tahn-SYOHN ohz ar-NAHK ah-VEK lay brah-SLEH
phrases.cultural_note: A common scam near Sacré-Cœur: someone ties a friendship bracelet on your wrist, then demands payment. Keep your hands in your pockets and walk past firmly saying 'Non!'

responses.english: Thanks for the advice, I will be careful.
responses.phonetic: mehr-SEE doo kohn-SAY, zhuh fuh-RAY ah-tahn-SYOHN
responses.local: Merci du conseil, je ferai attention.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Amélie film locations
phrases.text_local: Où est le café du film Amélie ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh kah-FAY doo FEELM ah-may-LEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Café des Deux Moulins (15 Rue Lepic) was the café in the film Amélie. It's a working café — you can have coffee and crème brûlée there.

responses.english: It is the Café des Deux Moulins, at 15 Rue Lepic.
responses.phonetic: seh luh kah-FAY day duh moo-LAHN, oh kanz roo luh-PEEK
responses.local: C'est le Café des Deux Moulins, au quinze Rue Lepic.
